data.title: This old BTC whale prepares to buy another $1.1B ETH after building a $2.5B stash
data.description:

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/old-btc-whale-to-buy-another-1-1b-eth/

data.title: Eric Trump Explains Why Bitcoin Is Destined For $1 Million: ‘No Question About It’
data.description:
Eric Trump laid out a bluntly bullish, supply-and-demand case for why Bitcoin can reach $1 million, arguing that accelerating institutional access collides with Bitcoin’s fixed 21 million-coin cap, during a “Bitcoin Takes Over the World” session with David Bailey at the Bitcoin Asia conference in Hong Kong on August 29. Bitcoin’s Path To $1 Million Is ‘No Question’ “Everybody wants Bitcoin. Everybody is buying Bitcoin. And that’s uh that’s an incredible thing
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/eric-trump-why-bitcoin-is-destined-for-1-million/

data.title: Altcoin Season Heats Up – Pyth Near 100% Daily Gain; Pump.fun, Four Rally
data.description:

data.title: Judge Delays Decision on Federal Reserve Board Member's Dismissal
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a judge has postponed the decision regarding the dismissal of Federal Reserve Board member Lisa Cook. Both parties have been instructed to submit additional court documents by next Tuesday.

Previously, a Politico journalist reported that the Federal Reserve has not taken a stance on U.S. President Donald Trump's attempt to remove Lisa Cook. The institution has only requested a swift ruling from the judge and has pledged to comply with the decision.

data.title: Ethereum ETFs log $4 Billion in August net inflows, outperforming Bitcoin counterparts
data.description:
Ethereum ETFs log $4B August inflows, set for second-largest month since launch. Bitcoin ETFs face $622M outflows in August, while Ethereum funds gain strong traction. ETH ETFs narrow gap in trading volume, even as BTC funds hold lifetime inflow lead
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/ethereum-etfs-log-4-billion-in-august-net-inflows-outperforming-bitcoin-counterparts/

data.description:
